LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF IRINA NEDASHKOVSKAYA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR DISMISSAL OF CLASS ACTION PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.770. PLAINTIFF IRINA NEDASHKOVSKAYA'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR ORDER FOR DISMISSAL OF CLASS ACTION PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.770 IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING AND A PROPER SHOWING HAVING BEEN MADE UNDER CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.770, THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S CLASS CLAIMS, WHICH ARE THE FOURTEENTH AND FIFTEENTH CAUSES OF ACTION ALLEGED IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Order For Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF IRINA NEDASHKOVSKAYA's Motion For Order For Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770.

Plaintiff Irina Nedashkovskaya's unopposed Motion For Order For Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770 is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and a proper showing having been made under California Rules of Court, rule 3.770, the court orders dismissed without prejudice Plaintiff's class claims, which are the fourteenth and fifteenth causes of action alleged in the First Amended Complaint.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2025 Continued To Jun-04-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
